Klasse PluginChangeEvent

java.lang.Object
org.quurz.plugins.events.PluginChangeEvent
Bekannte direkte Unterklassen:
PluginChangeEvent.PluginChangeAnnouncementEvent, PluginChangeEvent.PluginInstallEvent, PluginChangeEvent.PluginUninstallEvent, PluginChangeEvent.PluginUpdateEvent
public abstract sealed class PluginChangeEvent extends Object permits PluginChangeEvent.PluginChangeAnnouncementEvent, PluginChangeEvent.PluginInstallEvent, PluginChangeEvent.PluginUpdateEvent, PluginChangeEvent.PluginUninstallEvent

Represents an event that occurs when a plugin's state changes.

This is a sealed class that defines the various types of lifecycle events that can occur for a plugin, such as installation, update, or removal.

Seit:
1.0.0

  • Felddetails

    • pluginId

      protected final PluginId pluginId

      The unique identifier of the plugin associated with this event.

  • Konstruktordetails

    • PluginChangeEvent

      protected PluginChangeEvent(PluginId pluginId)

      Initializes a new event for the specified plugin.

      Parameter:
      pluginId - the identifier of the affected plugin

  • Methodendetails

    • pluginChangeAnnouncementEvent

      public static PluginChangeEvent.PluginChangeAnnouncementEvent pluginChangeAnnouncementEvent(PluginId pluginId)

      Creates a new announcement event for the given plugin ID.

      Parameter:
      pluginId - the unique identifier of the plugin
      Gibt zurück:
      a new announcement event instance
      Seit:
      1.0.0

      a new install event instance

    • getPluginId

      protected PluginId getPluginId()

      Returns the unique identifier of the plugin that triggered this event.

      Gibt zurück:
      the plugin identifier
